name: CashMax
description_short: CashMax provides payday loans up to $255 in California with same-day funding via ACH deposit or in-branch pickup. Loans carry a $17.50 per $100 fee (456.25% APR) and are due on the borrower's next payday.
description_long:
CashMax is a California-licensed payday lender operating under the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation's Deferred Deposit Transaction Law. The company has been in operation since 2012 and maintains physical branch locations alongside an online application platform.

CashMax specializes exclusively in short-term payday loans ranging from $50 to $255, designed to bridge immediate cash gaps until the borrower's next paycheck. The company offers flexible funding methods: same-day ACH bank deposits (if approved before 9 AM PT) or immediate in-branch cash pickup. The application process requires a government ID, Social Security Number or ITIN, active checking account with direct deposits, bank statement, and proof of steady recurring income.

CashMax distinguishes itself through its transparent fee structure ($17.50 per $100 borrowed), explicit consumer warnings about payday loan misuse, and its no-cost Extended Payment Plan option for customers experiencing repayment difficulty. The company prominently displays its state licensing, actively discourages upfront payments, and warns against scams. Notably, CashMax does not offer loan rollover or extension options—loans must be repaid in full on the agreed due date, though eligible customers can access structured repayment plans.

This is a high-cost lending product suitable only for genuine short-term emergencies. The 456.25% APR makes CashMax fundamentally unsuitable as a regular financial tool. California's regulatory framework caps loan amounts at $255 and restricts terms, protecting borrowers from larger debt traps. Consumers should exhaust other options (payday alternatives, credit unions, employer advances) before using payday loans.
address: 2160 El Camino Ave Suite B, Sacramento, CA 95821

company_info.headquarters: 2160 El Camino Ave Suite B, Sacramento, CA 95821

pros: Same-day funding available if approved before 9 AM PT via ACH deposit or branch pickup
Transparent fee disclosure: clearly states $17.50 per $100 borrowed ($17.50 cost on $100 = $117.50 total repayment)
No-cost Extended Payment Plan option for customers unable to repay on due date
Legitimate state licensing under California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation
Straightforward application process: government ID, proof of income, and active bank account only
Explicitly warns customers that payday loans should not be used as long-term financial solutions
Clear scam alert and statement that customers cannot be prosecuted for non-repayment
cons: Extremely high APR of 456.25% makes this product unsuitable for any purpose except genuine short-term emergencies
Maximum loan amount of $255 is tightly constrained and may not cover larger emergencies
No loan rollovers or extensions allowed—full repayment must occur on next payday, creating risk of debt cycling if income is interrupted
Limited to California residents only; geographic restriction eliminates access for out-of-state borrowers
Repayment is automatic via bank account debit, creating overdraft risk if insufficient funds are present on due date
best_for: California residents facing a genuine one-time emergency (car repair, medical expense) with no other funding source and guaranteed income on next payday
Borrowers who need $50–$255 within hours and have a stable, documented paycheck
Consumers who understand the cost and can repay in full within 2–4 weeks without rollover
diagnosis: CashMax is best for California residents in genuine short-term financial emergencies (1–4 weeks) who have verified income and no alternative funding sources. The critical caveat: the 456.25% APR makes this product expensive and dangerous if used repeatedly or for non-emergency purposes; borrowers must have the income and discipline to repay in full on the next payday to avoid debt cycling.
services: Online payday loan application with instant document upload
Same-day ACH bank deposit funding (if approved before 9 AM PT)
In-branch cash pickup for same-day access
Automatic repayment via checking account debit on agreed due date
Early repayment option (pay in full at any branch before due date)
No-cost Extended Payment Plan for eligible customers experiencing repayment hardship
Physical branch locations for in-person service and cash pickup
Customer support via phone (707-474-9501) and online contact
Login portal for existing customers to manage accounts
Scam protection and fraud alert resources
FAQ and educational resources on payday loan costs and terms
